touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Benjamin Choi at PhotonAI. No answer, left voicemail introducing our sales productivity platform and mentioning we help fintech sales teams improve forecast accuracy.
Cold email to Benjamin Choi introducing our AI-powered sales platform with specific use cases for fintech sales organizations. No response received.
Follow-up email to Benjamin sharing a case study of a similar-sized fintech company that improved rep productivity by 34%. No response received.

LinkedIn message to Benjamin mentioning mutual connection and asking about current sales productivity challenges. Benjamin responded expressing interest in learning more about our approach to forecast accuracy.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently evaluating solutions to improve sales team productivity and forecast accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we've been looking at a few options. Our CRO wants better visibility into pipeline health.

next_steps: Schedule brief intro call

touches.ai_summary: 15-minute qualification call with Benjamin Choi. Discussed PhotonAI's current sales stack and pain points around rep productivity and forecast accuracy. Benjamin mentioned they're evaluating Clari as well. Confirmed budget authority and timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the need to improve sales productivity right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our sales team has grown to 50+ reps and we're struggling with consistent pipeline management and accurate forecasting.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform differ from Clari?
questions_asked.answer: We focus more on AI-driven automation and rep coaching, while Clari emphasizes forecasting. We also offer implementation consulting as part of our package.

next_steps: Send overview deck
Schedule deeper discovery call

touches.ai_summary: 12-minute follow-up qualification call with Benjamin. Reviewed the overview deck and discussed team size (52 reps) and desired outcomes. Benjamin confirmed Blake Wang (CRO) is the executive sponsor and would need to be involved in final decision.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in the evaluation process?
questions_asked.answer: Blake Wang, our CRO, will need to sign off. I'd also want to loop in a few of our sales managers for their input on the technical side.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 4-6 weeks for organizations your size, including data migration, training, and our consulting package to optimize workflows.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to map out detailed requirements

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Benjamin with discovery call agenda, including questions about current tools, pain points, and success metrics. Also requested information on PhotonAI's sales processes and org structure.

questions_asked.question: Can you share your current sales tech stack before our discovery call?
questions_asked.answer: We use Salesforce as our CRM, Gong for conversation intelligence, and a mix of homegrown tools for reporting.

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: 18-minute discovery call with Benjamin. Deep dive into PhotonAI's sales processes, current pain points with manual pipeline updates, and lack of AI-driven insights. Discussed integration requirements with Salesforce and Gong. Benjamin emphasized need for better rep coaching capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What are the top 3 outcomes you need to achieve in the next 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: Improve forecast accuracy to within 5%, reduce time reps spend on admin tasks by 30%, and give managers better coaching insights.

questions_asked.question: How do your AI automations actually save time for reps?
questions_asked.answer: Our AI auto-updates opportunity fields, suggests next best actions, and provides real-time coaching prompts during calls based on deal context.

questions_asked.question: What's your current forecast accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: We're running about 15-20% off target most quarters, which creates planning challenges for Blake and the exec team.

next_steps: Send detailed integration requirements doc
Schedule technical discovery with sales managers

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Benjamin with integration documentation, ROI calculator based on 52 seats, and case studies from fintech customers. Also proposed bringing in Nicole Weber and other sales managers for technical evaluation.
next_steps: Benjamin to review with team and schedule technical discovery

touches.ai_summary: 11-minute discovery call with Benjamin to review ROI projections and answer questions about the consulting package. Discussed timeline for evaluation and confirmed PhotonAI is also in active conversations with Clari.

questions_asked.question: What does the consulting package include beyond standard implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We provide a dedicated success consultant for 90 days who helps optimize your sales processes, build custom automations, and train managers on using AI insights for coaching.

questions_asked.question: Where are you in the process with Clari?
questions_asked.answer: We've had initial demos. They're strong on forecasting but don't offer the consulting or automation depth we're looking for. We want to see both solutions before deciding.

next_steps: Coordinate technical discovery with sales managers

touches.ai_summary: 20-minute follow-up call with Benjamin to finalize discovery findings and prepare for demo stage. Discussed technical requirements, integration complexity, and confirmed the evaluation committee: Benjamin (champion), Nicole Weber and other managers (technical evaluators), Abigail White (procurement), and Blake Wang (final approver).

questions_asked.question: What are the must-have capabilities versus nice-to-haves?
questions_asked.answer: Must-haves are Salesforce integration, AI-driven pipeline updates, and manager coaching dashboards. Nice-to-haves are mobile app and Slack integration.

questions_asked.question: Can you show us real examples of the AI automations in action during the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. We'll do a live demo with your Salesforce sandbox and show exactly how the AI processes deal data and generates recommendations.

objections: We need to make sure this doesn't create more work for reps during the transition
next_steps: Schedule demo for Benjamin
Schedule separate technical demo for Nicole and team

touches.ai_summary: 47-minute demo for Benjamin Choi showcasing core platform capabilities including AI automations, pipeline management, and coaching insights. Walked through live examples using PhotonAI's Salesforce data structure. Benjamin was particularly engaged with the automation features and asked detailed questions about customization.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize which fields the AI updates automatically?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable. You control which fields are auto-updated versus suggested for rep review.

questions_asked.question: How does the AI handle edge cases or unusual deal structures?
questions_asked.answer: The AI learns from your historical data patterns. For edge cases, it flags them for rep review rather than auto-updating.

questions_asked.question: What did you think of the coaching dashboard for managers?
questions_asked.answer: That's exactly what our managers need. The ability to see which reps are struggling with objections or next steps could be game-changing.

next_steps: Schedule technical demo for Nicole Weber and sales managers
Send demo recording and feature documentation

touches.ai_summary: 45-minute technical demo for Nicole Weber and sales management team. Deep dive into implementation requirements, data migration, integration architecture, and admin controls. Nicole asked detailed questions about security, data privacy, and customization limits. Overall positive reception but some concern about change management.

questions_asked.question: What's the data migration process like from our current systems?
questions_asked.answer: We extract historical deal data from Salesforce, process it through our AI to build your custom model, then run parallel for 2 weeks before full cutover.

questions_asked.question: How do we ensure data privacy and security given the AI processing?
questions_asked.answer: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit, we're SOC 2 Type II certified, and you control which data the AI can access through role-based permissions.

questions_asked.question: What if reps resist using the new system?
questions_asked.answer: Our consulting package specifically addresses change management. We work with your managers on rollout strategy and provide ongoing training to drive adoption.

objections: We're concerned about the learning curve for reps who are already overloaded
next_steps: Prepare technical implementation plan
Schedule executive meeting with Blake Wang

touches.ai_summary: 27-minute executive meeting with Blake Wang (CRO) to discuss strategic fit, business outcomes, and ROI. Benjamin joined to provide context. Blake focused on forecast accuracy improvements and measurable productivity gains. Asked about competitive positioning versus Clari and referenced other tools in their stack.

questions_asked.question: What differentiates you from Clari beyond the consulting package?
questions_asked.answer: Clari is primarily a forecasting tool. We provide end-to-end rep productivity automation—from call insights to pipeline updates to coaching recommendations—all AI-driven. The consulting ensures you actually realize the ROI.

questions_asked.question: What's the expected ROI timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers see measurable productivity gains within 60 days and forecast accuracy improvements within 90 days. Based on your team size, we project $400K+ in rep time savings annually.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like for you in the first 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: Forecast accuracy within 5%, 25%+ reduction in admin time for reps, and managers actually using the coaching insights to improve team performance.

next_steps: Prepare formal proposal with pricing
Send executive ROI summary

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Benjamin with executive summary from Blake meeting, ROI analysis for 52 seats, and proposal timeline. Confirmed pricing structure for automations_plus_consulting package and outlined next steps toward proposal review.
next_steps: Schedule proposal review call
Prepare detailed SOW for consulting package

touches.ai_summary: 28-minute proposal call with Benjamin Choi reviewing detailed pricing, implementation timeline, and consulting scope. Walked through $94,800 ACV for 52 seats with automations_plus_consulting tier. Benjamin asked clarifying questions about contract terms and consulting deliverables. Discussed internal approval process.

questions_asked.question: Is the consulting package a one-time engagement or ongoing?
questions_asked.answer: It's a 90-day intensive engagement included in year one. After that, you can optionally extend at a reduced rate, but most customers are self-sufficient by then.

questions_asked.question: What's the contract term and payment structure?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is annual contract, paid quarterly or annually. We offer a small discount for annual prepay.

questions_asked.question: What's your internal approval process from here?
questions_asked.answer: I'll review with Blake and the procurement team. Abigail White handles vendor contracts, so she'll need to be looped in. Blake has final sign-off.

next_steps: Send formal proposal and MSA
Loop in Abigail White for procurement review
Schedule exec alignment call with Blake

touches.ai_summary: 43-minute executive negotiation meeting with Blake Wang, Benjamin Choi, and Abigail White. Discussed pricing, contract terms, and implementation guarantees. Blake pushed on pricing given competitive alternatives and asked for discount. Abigail raised questions about SLA terms and data ownership. Overall constructive conversation but clear negotiation ahead.

questions_asked.question: Clari has come in lower on pricing. Can you match or get closer to their number?
questions_asked.answer: Our pricing reflects the consulting package and deeper automation capabilities. I can explore some flexibility on a multi-year commitment, but we're solving a broader problem than Clari.

questions_asked.question: What are the SLA guarantees for uptime and support response?
questions_asked.answer: 99.9% uptime SLA with 2-hour response time for critical issues. We can discuss enhanced SLAs if needed.

questions_asked.question: Who owns the AI models and custom configurations we build?
questions_asked.answer: You own all your data and custom configurations. The underlying AI models are our IP, but your trained models and settings are fully portable if you ever leave.

objections: The pricing is higher than Clari's proposal
next_steps: Explore multi-year pricing options
Revise MSA based on Abigail's feedback
Schedule follow-up negotiation call

touches.ai_summary: 15-minute negotiation call with Benjamin Choi. This meeting was rescheduled once. Discussed Blake's pricing concerns and explored options for multi-year discount or phased rollout. Benjamin indicated procurement wants to see revised pricing before Blake will sign off.

questions_asked.question: Would a multi-year commitment work better for your planning and budget?
questions_asked.answer: Possibly. Blake is cautious about long-term commitments without seeing results first. Maybe a year one pilot with option to expand?

questions_asked.question: What discount could you offer on a 2 or 3-year deal?
questions_asked.answer: I can bring back options. Typically 10-15% on multi-year depending on term and prepayment.

next_steps: Prepare multi-year pricing scenarios
Follow up with revised proposal

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Benjamin with three pricing scenarios: (1) one-year at $94,800, (2) two-year at 10% discount, (3) three-year at 15% discount with annual prepay. Also addressed Abigail's MSA concerns and proposed revised contract terms.
next_steps: Benjamin to review with Blake and procurement
Schedule pricing finalization call

touches.ai_summary: 26-minute pricing call with Benjamin Choi. Reviewed the three pricing scenarios and discussed trade-offs. Benjamin indicated Blake is leaning toward the two-year option but wants confirmation on implementation guarantees and success metrics. Also discussed start date and Q2 budget availability.

questions_asked.question: Can you guarantee we'll hit the ROI projections you've outlined?
questions_asked.answer: We can include success milestones in the contract tied to specific metrics like forecast accuracy and rep time savings. If we don't hit agreed benchmarks by month 6, we'll extend consulting support at no cost.

questions_asked.question: When could we realistically go live if we sign in the next two weeks?
questions_asked.answer: Kickoff within one week of contract signature, 4-week implementation, so live by early next month.

questions_asked.question: Is Blake comfortable with the two-year option at 10% off?
questions_asked.answer: He's close. He wants to see the success guarantee language in writing, but I think that gets us there.

next_steps: Draft success guarantee addendum
Schedule final exec meeting with Blake to close

touches.ai_summary: 45-minute final executive meeting with Blake Wang, Benjamin Choi, and Abigail White. Reviewed revised two-year proposal with 10% discount, success guarantees, and updated MSA terms. Blake expressed comfort with the structure and ROI projections. Abigail confirmed legal terms are acceptable. Discussion turned to implementation planning and change management strategy.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through the success guarantee one more time—what exactly are you committing to?
questions_asked.answer: If we don't achieve 10%+ improvement in forecast accuracy and 20%+ reduction in rep admin time by month 6, we'll extend consulting support for an additional 60 days at no charge and work until we hit those benchmarks.

questions_asked.question: Are we aligned to move forward with the two-year agreement?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I'm comfortable. Abigail, do we have everything we need from legal and procurement?

questions_asked.question: What's the timeline for contract signature and kickoff?
questions_asked.answer: We can turn around the final paperwork in 2-3 days. Abigail needs about a week for internal approvals. So roughly 10 days to signature, then immediate kickoff.

next_steps: Send final contract documents for signature
Prepare implementation kickoff plan
Coordinate with Abigail on procurement workflow

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Benjamin and Abigail with final contract documents, MSA with success guarantee addendum, and two-year pricing at $85,320 annually ($170,640 total). Also sent implementation kickoff agenda and introduced implementation team including Aaliyah Santos as implementation lead. Requested signature timeline.
next_steps: Await contract signature from Abigail/procurement
